If IMAP reveals new replies: write to new_replies.json and re-invoke BRAIN for classification.

action_on_new_reply_found.leads_1_3_22: If IMAP reveals ANY reply: cancel LinkedIn permanently for that lead. Write entry to new_replies.json immediately. Re-invoke BRAIN for classification. If converted: write CHANGELOG.md — Campaign Milestone #1 — first revenue.
action_on_new_reply_found.fu_leads_30_31_32_58_59: If IMAP reveals reply for any fu lead: do NOT send fu_04x for that lead. Write to new_replies.json. Classify.
action_on_new_reply_found.any_other_lead: Write to new_replies.json. Classify. Update lead status. If unsubscribe: suppress permanently within 24 hours (GDPR Article 21).
action_on_new_reply_found.conversion_protocol: Log CHANGELOG.md: 'Campaign Milestone #1: first revenue — [business], [amount], [date].' Invoice today. Begin delivery same day.
